message:
fix(e2e): improve test isolation with unique zone directories and flexible assertions

Fix intermittent E2E test failures caused by shared filesystem state between concurrent
test runs:

- discord_compliance_e2e: generate unique zone_dir per handshake_request using PID +
  atomic counter, and supply explicit zone_dir in subscribe and rate_limit tests to
  prevent cross-test interference in connector state directories
- telegram_compliance_e2e: same unique zone_dir pattern for handshake_request helper
  and send_message test to isolate connector file-backed state
- llm_router_compliance_e2e: relax network_constraints assertion for estimate_cost
  operation — accept either absent network_constraints or empty host_allow array,
  since local-only operations may omit the section entirely
- fcp-e2e/Cargo.toml: enable "testing" feature for fcp-discord dependency so test
  helpers and mock connectors are available in E2E tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
